query: Hey can you look at this PR? It's at github.com/myorg/api-server/pull/447 — adds a webhook handler for stripe events. I want a normal-depth review, nothing crazy, just diverse perspectives
Quick review of my changes please — I refactored the cache invalidation logic in src/cache/redis_client.ts and want a sanity check before opening the PR
What do you think of this diff? Just pushed it to my feature branch — branch is feat/billing-v2 if you want to look. Mostly TypeScript changes to the invoice service
review my spec for the new billing API — it's at docs/specs/billing-v3.md. would love multi-perspective feedback on whether the requirements are clear and complete
look at this design doc for the notification service and tell me what's broken about it. it's in design-docs/notify-v2.md and i need balanced feedback before i present to the team friday
give me a multi-perspective code review on the auth refactor in src/auth/ — speed is fine, just want different angles. don't need a super deep audit, just decent coverage

i wrote up an implementation plan for migrating off redis to valkey. plan is at docs/plans/valkey-migration.md. can you review it before i start executing? want different lenses on whether the steps make sense
thoughts on the typescript changes in this branch? mostly want to know if there are obvious bugs or weird patterns before i merge
review this — `git diff main..feat/jwt-refresh` — feature branch for jwt refresh tokens, want a normal code review with multiple perspectives
Help me write a code review comment on Sarah's PR — she added a database query inside a loop and I want to phrase the feedback constructively
I want a thorough audit of the security implications of this auth migration — be really rigorous, take your time, this is the kind of change where a missed bug = customer data leak
Walk me through what this code is doing — I'm reading our payment processing module and I'm confused about the retry logic in src/payments/retry.py
I need to give feedback to a junior dev about their PR — they wrote a 600-line function. Help me phrase it constructively without being discouraging
triage the issues from yesterday's code review — they're saved in .issues/2026-05-13__code-review-auth.md and i want to go through them one by one
Review this academic paper on transformer architecture — it's a preprint about a new attention mechanism. I want to understand if their claims hold up
Run the linter on src/api/handlers/ and tell me what it finds — i'm pretty sure there are some ESLint violations i missed
Show me the diff for the last commit on main — git log says it was a refactor but i want to see what actually changed
Help me understand what 'code review' means in agile methodology — is it the same as peer review? I'm new to this team
I'm doing a self-review of my own code before opening a PR. Walk me through what I should look for — checklist style would be great
Audit my expense report — i need to make sure the line items match my receipts before submitting to finance
